sections.title: Interacting with the south-eastern ladder before joining the Edgeville Monastery order

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Only members of our order can go up there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well can I join your order?

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: No. I am sorry, but I feel you are not devout enough.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Ok, I see you are someone suitable for our order. You may join.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't this place built a bit out of the way?

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: We like it that way actually! We get disturbed less. We still get rather a large amount of travellers looking for sanctuary and healing here as it is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get further into the monastery?

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I'm sorry but only members of our order are allowed in the second level of the monastery.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well can I join your order?

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: No. I am sorry, but I feel you are not devout enough.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Ok, I see you are someone suitable for our order. You may join.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I might be able to... What did you have in mind?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you remove the sigils from my spirit shields?

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I think I shoud be able to manage that. However in doing so, I'm afraid I'll have to destroy the blessed shield itself. You'll only get the sigil back.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I can go ahead and break down all of the shields in your inventory now if you'd like?.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Ah, I was told to expect you, please take this as thanks!

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Congratulations, traveller!

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I must say, I despise the equipment you have chosen to wear.

sections.title: Delivering a letter from the Wise Old Man

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got a message for you from your friend in Draynor Village.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Gosh, you are very kind to bring a message to my remote monastery!

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I'd give you a reward, but you don't seem to have any space for it. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: I grow a few herbs in my little cabbage patch; please take some as a sign of my gratitude.

lines.speaker: Abbot Langley
lines.text: Allow me to bestow on you Saradomin's blessings...
